allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json with open\('/c/Users/Daan/Documents/GitHub/Website_Open_Topography_EU/website/data/region_map_data_belgium.geojson'\) as f: data = json.load\(f\) for feat in data['features']: props = feat['properties'] name = props.get\('Name', ''\) planimetric = props.get\('Planimetric', 'MISSING'\) parent = props.get\('ParentCountry', ''\) adm = props.get\('ADM', ''\) print\(f'Name={name}, Parent={parent}, ADM={adm}, Planimetric={planimetric}'\) ")
